title: The Seducing Woods Trap
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Carrot, Sanji as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: The group is pulled into Whole Cake Island’s strange living landscape, where the forest itself becomes an enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The crew is after Sanji... but could they have bitten off more than they can chew?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Madame br[lee is having some fun with them right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: whose food will they end up as?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They would make quite a delicious smoothie.)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's get the hell out of this place as quickly as possible!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if it's a devil fruit user....

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 27 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
